business_description.nature_of_business: Regional trucking and freight logistics — LTL and FTL general freight, warehousing and distribution services across the Midwest and Mid-Atlantic corridors

positives: 38 years in business with 25 years of current management continuity
GPS tracking / ELD devices installed in all vehicles
Annual MVR checks performed on all drivers
CDL licenses verified at time of hire
Valid DOT number and MC authority maintained
Drivers in compliance with FMCSA Hours-of-Service regulations
concerns: No written contracts with all subcontractors
DOT violations or out-of-service orders in the past 3 years
CSA BASIC Crash Indicator score above intervention threshold (currently being addressed)
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Prior insurance: 2024 Hanover Insurance Group — 10 claims; 2023 Hartford Financial Services — 13 claims; 2022 Auto-Owners Insurance — 12 claims. No cancellations.

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Regional trucking and freight logistics — LTL and FTL general freight, warehousing and distribution services across the Midwest and Mid-Atlantic corridors. Hours of Operation: Mon-Fri 6:00 AM - 4:30 PM. Primary commodities: Dry van general freight, packaged goods; Flatbed: steel, lumber, machinery. Sleeper-cab tractors used for long-haul operations. Refrigerated reefer units carrying perishable freight. Interstate FMCSA operating authority.
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: Formal safety program in place. GPS tracking/ELD devices installed in all vehicles. MVR checks performed on all drivers at least annually. CDL licenses verified at time of hire. Drivers in compliance with FMCSA Hours-of-Service (HOS) regulations. Hired auto / non-owned auto exposure covered.
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Prior Insurance History — 2024: Hanover Insurance Group, 10 claims, no cancellations; 2023: Hartford Financial Services, 13 claims, no cancellations; 2022: Auto-Owners Insurance, 12 claims, no cancellations. CSA BASIC Crash Indicator score currently above intervention threshold and being addressed. DOT violations/out-of-service orders reported in past 3 years.
